    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    C

    calculateDelta(Card, int) - Static method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.CardValueCalculator
    Calculates the point contribution of a card given the current table sum.
    Card - Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.model
    Represents a single playing card in the Cincuentazo game.
    Card(int, int, int) - Constructor for class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Card
    Constructs a new Card with the given value, suit and location.
    CardValueCalculator - Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.model
    Utility class that encapsulates the card-value rules for Cincuentazo.
    checkAndEliminateCurrentPlayer() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameController
    Verifica si el jugador en turno debe ser eliminado por no tener ninguna carta jugable y, de ser así, lo elimina.
    checkAndEliminateCurrentPlayer() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameLogic
    Checks whether the current player must be eliminated (no playable card) and, if so, triggers elimination.
    chooseBestCard(int) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.MachinePlayer
    Selects the best card to play from the machine's hand using a greedy strategy.
